entries.work: Continued ML/AI Portfolio dashboard refinement. Improved GUI elements and tested all 10 project launches from dashboard.
entries.blockers: Minor threading issues resolved with proper synchronization
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Started Brain Tumor Detection (NeuroScan AI) project. Set up ensemble deep learning architecture with ResNet50, EfficientNetV2, and Vision Transformer models for MRI analysis.
entries.blockers: GPU memory constraints solved with gradient checkpointing
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Enhanced ML/AI Portfolio typing animations and knowledge flow panels. Tested completion popup and upload/test interface functionality.
entries.blockers: File path handling on Windows required special path formatting
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Began Brain Tumor Detection data preprocessing. Implemented medical image normalization, cropping, and augmentation for MRI datasets.
entries.blockers: Dataset size handling implemented with batching strategy
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Tested ML/AI Portfolio end-to-end workflow. Verified all 10 projects launch correctly and produce expected outputs.
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Brain Tumor Detection: Started model training. Trained ResNet50, EfficientNetV2, and Vision Transformer on preprocessed MRI data.
entries.blockers: Initial overfitting handled with dropout and regularization
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Enhanced ML/AI Portfolio completion popup. Added project-specific test report generation and results display.
entries.blockers: Text scrolling performance optimized with update batching
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Brain Tumor Detection: Integrated YOLO v11 content filtering. Tested filtering of non-medical images to ensure system integrity.
entries.blockers: Inference speed optimized with FP16 precision and batch processing
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Tested ML/AI Portfolio upload functionality. Verified file type filtering and custom data handling for each project.
entries.blockers: File encoding issues on Windows resolved with UTF-8 handling
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Brain Tumor Detection: Evaluated model performance. Computed accuracy, precision, recall metrics. Achieved 99.03% validation accuracy.
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Performed debugging across ML/AI Portfolio modules. Fixed edge cases in dashboard, launcher, and upload dialogs.
entries.blockers: Multiple edge cases identified and fixed iteratively
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Brain Tumor Detection: Created meta-ensemble (stacker) MLP to fuse predictions from three models. Trained stacker for optimal ensemble performance.
entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S

entries.work: Validated ML/AI Portfolio test reports. Verified accuracy metrics, file processing, and results display for all 10 projects.
